releases.title: Redesigned onboarding and chat polish
releases.summary: This beta introduces a redesigned five-step onboarding flow with a warmer palette, refreshes the chat surface with better dark-mode contrast and clearer copy feedback, and tightens the model picker and menu bar quick panel.

sections.title: Onboarding
items: Redesigned onboarding into five promise and setup screens with a warm palette and a borderless window.
Restored the animated welcome screen before the onboarding flow.

sections.title: Chat
items: Copy buttons now sit below the message with a checkmark confirmation when copied.
Loosened sidebar row spacing and increased dark-mode contrast across chat and the sidebar.

sections.title: Model picker and menu bar
items: Hid Apple Foundation from user-facing model surfaces.
Menu bar quick panel now stays open when you switch models.

releases.title: Polish across the model picker, composer, and settings
releases.summary: This beta adds an Account panel, redesigns the model picker, and refreshes the composer — plus a light-mode pass and a couple of fixes to chat streaming and factory reset.

image.alt: Darius workspace reviewing a chat sidebar change
image.label: Release screenshot

sections.title: Highlights
items: Account panel in Settings.
Redesigned model picker as a compact, logo-aware list.
Refreshed composer bottom bar.
Menu bar quick ask now requires sign-in.

sections.title: Polish
items: Light-mode pass on the model picker popover, composer edge, and search placeholder.
Sidebar default and thinking cache invalidation.
New DMG installer background.

sections.title: Fixes
items: Factory reset shutdown order.
Task drafts and background chat streams.

releases.title: The first public Darius beta.
releases.summary: This release turns the private Darius fork into a downloadable beta: signed app builds, Darius-owned update infrastructure, mandatory sign-in, refreshed branding, and the first pass at the new workspace UI.

sections.title: Highlights
items: Shipped the first public beta release through the Darius update repository.
Added mandatory Supabase sign-in for release builds.
Adopted the Darius three-triangles brand mark across the app and website.
Added the menu bar quick ask panel for fast access from macOS.

sections.title: Improvements
items: Refined the task sidebar, chat canvas, settings surfaces, and onboarding copy.
Bundled the plugin catalog and binaries inside the app for a simpler beta setup.
Added screenshot seed data and a UI catalog to make future visual review easier.

sections.title: Fixes
items: Fixed release signing issues around Developer ID Apple OAuth.
Fixed Metal toolchain setup in the release workflow.
Excluded Icon Composer source from the release app target.

sections.title: Infrastructure
items: Moved release assets, appcast, sandbox URLs, and update hosting to Darius-owned infrastructure.
